content:
MODULE: cosmos.staging.swarm_ideas.jito_integration
FILE: cosmos/staging/swarm_ideas/jito_integration.py (142 lines)
CATEGORY: staging

DESCRIPTION: Module for integrating Cosmos with Jito's trading infrastructure.
Provides functions to fetch available assets and execute swaps.

CLASSES:
- JitoIntegrationError(Exception): Base exception class for Jito integration errors.
- AuthenticationError(JitoIntegrationError): Exception raised for authentication failures.
- APIError(JitoIntegrationError): Exception raised for API-related errors.
- JitoIntegration
  Methods: async def close(self) -> None
  Methods: async def fetch_assets(self) -> List[Dict[str, str]]
  Methods: async def execute_swap(self, from_asset_id: str, to_asset_id: str, amount: float) -> Dict[str, str]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def init_jito_integration(api_key: str) -> JitoIntegration
- async def fetch_jito_assets(api_key: str) -> List[Dict[str, str]]
- async def swap_assets(api_key: str, from_asset: str, to_asset: str, amount: float) -> Dict[str, str]
